---
title: "10_bayes_approach"
author: "Jagadeesh Puvvula"
date: "2025-01-08"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
ope_df<- read_csv("~/Documents/ope_ssis/res_sing_imput/ope_processed_df.csv") |>
  select(c(1:3,9)) |>
  mutate(
    result_sg_adj = log2(result_sg_adj),
    visit = recode(visit, 
                        "prenatal_16W" = "V1",
                        "prenatal_26W" = "V2",
                        "delivery" = "V3",
                        "postnatal_1_yr" = "V4",
                        "postnatal_2_yr" = "V5",
                        "postnatal_3_yr" = "V6",
                        "postnatal_5_yr" = "V7",
                        "postnatal_8_yr" = "V8"),
         visit = factor(visit, levels = c("V1", "V2", "V3", "V4", "V5", "V6", "V7", "V8"))
         )|>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = c(analyte_code, visit),
    values_from = result_sg_adj
  )

out_cov<- read_csv("~/Documents/ope_ssis/res_sing_imput/out_cov.csv")

analy_df<- right_join(ope_df, out_cov, by="participant_id") |> 

# Response and covariates
sbd_cov <- analy_df |> 
            select(ss_std_score_c, pb_std_score_c, ss_std_score_p, pb_std_score_p,
                   gender, child_race, mat_age, mari_st_p4, mom_edu_p4_cat, mid_income_p4,
                    bdi_p4, depression_p4_cat, rfr_gs_t, cotinine, lead)

# Exposure data
sbd_exp <- list(bcep = analy_df %>% select(starts_with("bcep_")),
                bdcipp = analy_df %>% select(starts_with("bdcipp_")),
                dnbp = analy_df %>% select(starts_with("dnbp_")),
                dphp = analy_df %>% select(starts_with("dphp_")))
sbd_exp <- sbd_exp %>% lapply(as.matrix)


tdlnm.fit <- dlmtree(formula = ss_std_score_c ~ gender + child_race + 
                     mat_age + 
                     mari_st_p4 + mom_edu_p4_cat + mid_income_p4 + 
                     rfr_gs_t + bdi_p4 +
                     cotinine + lead ,
                     data = sbd_cov,
                     exposure.data = sbd_exp[["bcep"]],
                     dlm.type = "linear",
                     family = "gaussian",
                     tdlnm.exposure.splits = 20,
                     n.burn = 250, n.iter = 1000, n.thin = 5)
```
